tasks.label: build: prepare and compile
args:
set -e && mkdir -p build && 
[ -d views ] && cp -R views build/ || true && 
[ -d css ] && cp -R css build/ || true && 
[ -d js ] && cp -R js build/ || true && 
[ -d static ] && cp -R static build/ || true && 
[ -d public ] && cp -R public build/ || true && 
# build the Go binary into build/ using workspace folder basename as name
go build -o build/${workspaceFolderBasename} .

tasks.label: run: execute built binary
args:
&& 
[ -d js ] && cp -R js build/ || true && 
[ -d static ] && cp -R static build/ || true && 
[ -d public ] && cp -R public build/ || true && 
# build the Go binary into build/ using workspace folder basename as name
go build -o build/${workspaceFolderBasename} .
